features.name: assertion with conditional antecedent
features.description: Code should include an assert statement with a conditional antecedent using if statement

features.name: assume constraint statement
features.description: Code should include an assume statement used as formal constraint

features.name: cover statement for formal verification
features.description: Code should include a cover statement for formal verification coverage checking

features.name: sequential assertion with complementary conditions
features.description: Code should include two assert statements with complementary if conditions for the same expression
features.snippet:
if (a) assert (b == c);
if (!a) assert (b != c);
